proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients receiving treatment_pembrolizumab have different pfs_months compared to those not receiving treatment_pembrolizumab.
Patients receiving treatment_sotorasib have different pfs_months compared to those not receiving treatment_sotorasib.
Patients receiving treatment_olaparib have different pfs_months compared to those not receiving treatment_olaparib.
Patients receiving treatment_osimertinib have different pfs_months compared to those not receiving treatment_osimertinib.

analyses.result_summary: Mean pfs_months: 3.414 vs 3.449 (diff=-0.035, p=0.0811 if p_value else 'N/A')
Mean pfs_months: 3.641 vs 3.319 (diff=0.322, p=0.0000 if p_value else 'N/A')
Mean pfs_months: 3.414 vs 3.439 (diff=-0.025, p=0.2546 if p_value else 'N/A')
Mean pfs_months: 3.434 vs 3.431 (diff=0.004, p=0.8703 if p_value else 'N/A')
